category_sources: Official documentation at https://lcm-proj.github.io/lcm/ describes LCM as libraries and tools for message passing and data marshalling for real-time systems.
source_facts.description says it provides libraries and tools for message passing and data marshalling.
display_name_sources: Official documentation heading is LCM Documentation.
docs_sources: Official lcm-proj.github.io site is a dedicated documentation domain with install, build, tutorial, language API, and protocol docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/lcm-proj/lcm, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official documentation describes publish/subscribe messaging, automatic marshalling, UDP multicast, and robotics/autonomous systems use.
source_facts.description identifies message passing and data marshalling.
